file_name: Discovery Holiday Parks - four Breeze Holiday Parks - Questionnaire.pdf

bullets: Katherine, NT. Please also outline any alternative suppliers of short-term accommodation and/or caravan and camping facilities in these locations, and whether the facilities compete closely with Discovery Holiday Parks and Breeze Holiday Parks
questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Discovery Holiday Parks and Breeze Holiday Parks are close competitors in the market for short-term accommodation and/or caravan and camping facilities in:

bullets: similarity of services they offer, such as the number of powered/unpowered sites
types and quality of amenities available at these alternative accommodations, such as toilets, kitchens, and/or recreational facilities
the location of the alternative accommodation
questions.text: With regard to Question 1, provide details as to the:
To what extent do other types of short-term accommodation, such as resorts, motels, hotels, hostels, and holiday rentals compete with suppliers of caravan parks and camping facilities?

Outline how easy it is to open a caravan park and/or camping facility, including obtaining supply of necessary inputs, any regulatory barriers (such as planning regulations or industry specific locations), and the availability of suitable property.
Outline the costs of converting unpowered caravan sites to powered sites, including any necessary inputs or planning regulations.
Outline any further concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including regarding the booking services offered by Discovery Holiday Parks through the “G’day Parks” network.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Discovery Holiday Parks and/or the four Breeze Holiday Parks.
